title: evolvulus boliviensis
intro: Evolvulus boliviensis, also known as Blue Myrtle or Dwarf Morning Glory, is a flowering plant species in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus boliviensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Evolvulus boliviensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
